description: This file defines a REST API controller for managing loan application drafts, including endpoints for creating, listing, retrieving, updating, patching sections, making risk-based decisions, and deleting drafts. It uses Spring Boot annotations and JWT-based authentication.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraftController
classes.description: Spring Boot REST controller handling loan draft related API endpoints, secured with JWT authentication.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new loan application draft for the authenticated user.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Lists all drafts for the authenticated user.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves a specific draft by its ID for the authenticated user.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Replaces the draft fields, optionally with optimistic concurrency.

methods.name: patchSection
methods.description: Partially updates a wizard section within a draft by merging given JSON.

methods.name: decide
methods.description: Runs risk scoring and decisioning on a draft, updating its status accordingly.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes a draft if owned by the authenticated user.

methods.name: subjectAsUserId
methods.description: Extracts the user UUID from the authentication token, or throws an error if invalid.
